creator: jilles@FreeBSD.org
text:
For PR bin/107171, SVN r197956 changed systat to exit if getch() returns an error other than [EINTR]. This fixes the infinite loop problem.

The VM_METER sysctl is inherently slow because what it does: it iterates over all processes, threads and VM objects. The sysctl(8) output suggests that the totals are computed every five seconds, but in fact this happens when the sysctl is read.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 107171 ***
